_comment: Final A1 generation pass (2026-05-29, autopilot session 2d) to close the last 3 thin A1 concepts (svo-word-order, numbers-basic, preterite-regular). 32 candidates generated via Groq-70B; norwegian-linguist reviewed; 20 seeded (terminal periods normalized on write). RESULT: all 22 A1 concepts now >=30/concept, A1 avg 34.0, 0 audit ERRORS.

kept_per_file.numbers-basic: 5/8 (dropped 'six breads' mismatch, '22 eyes' absurd, AND 'Jeg har tjue år' — Romance-calque; Norwegian uses 'er' for age, overriding the linguist KEEP)
kept_per_file.preterite-regular: 4/8 (dropped irregular/strong verbs misfiled as regular: kjørte/leste/skrev, and non-word 'synte')

terminal_period_normalization: applied to survivors on write (the content-gate does not enforce terminal punctuation; this fixed the issue that sank the prior svo batch)
main_finding: Across 4 generation+review batches this session, the mechanical gate's true-keep rate was ~49-65%. The norwegian-linguist pass is non-negotiable before seeding.
